data.title: National Working Meeting 2026: Gondowangi's Momentum to Strengthen Foundation and Grow Stronger
data.content_html:
Jakarta - The 2026 National Working Meeting (Rakernas) serves as a crucial momentum for PT Gondowangi to strengthen its business foundation, align its vision, and prepare more solid strategic steps for the future.


Carrying the theme Grow Stronger, this is not just a slogan, but a firm commitment from all elements of the company to continue growing—both in strategy formulation, execution sharpness, and collaborative strength across divisions.

Watch Also:The Excitement of Gondowangi Goes to Hong Kong 2024: Beyond Limits!

Through in-depth evaluation and continuous strategic planning, Gondowangi continues to build adaptive business strength. We are ready to answer all challenges in the dynamic body care industry market and proactively create new opportunities in the future.


However, we realize that the true strength of Gondowangi lies in a solid team, high mutual trust, and synergistic movement with the same goals. With the spirit of Grow Stronger, let's step forward together, strengthen synergy, and solidify our commitment to a brighter future.

data.title: Regional Working Meeting 2025: Synergy for Progress and Breaking Boundaries
data.content_html:
Jakarta - PT Gondowangi's 2025 Regional Working Meeting (Rakerda) was successfully held, bringing a new spirit to all operational and managerial teams across various regions.


Carrying the main messages of Synergy for Progress and Breaking Boundaries, this event focused on aligning regional targets with the company's grand vision at the national level. All participants were encouraged to think beyond habits and innovate to win market share.


Hopefully, the spirit and positive energy created from this Rakerda will continue to inspire us all in every step and program execution moving forward. See you at the next peak of achievement!

data.title: The Excitement of Gondowangi Goes to Hong Kong 2024: Beyond Limits!
data.content_html:
“For those on the road, please be careful. For those in the heart, when are we going out? 😁”


Hong Kong - As a form of appreciation for the hard work and extraordinary dedication of the team throughout the year, PT Gondowangi closed the end of 2024 with an unforgettable journey: Gondowangi Goes to Hong Kong 2024! 🥳


This trip is not just a vacation, but a celebration of our shared success (Celebrate Success) and proof that with hard work, we are able to go beyond existing limits. This moment of togetherness strengthens the sense of kinship and cohesiveness among employees.

Watch Also:Unleashed Natural Beauty: Gondowangi's Commitment to Natural Beauty

After conquering Hong Kong and recharging our energy, the next question is: Next, where else are we going? Come on, continue to prove that you can also go beyond your limits, dream bigger, and act more real!

data.title: Unleashed Natural Beauty: Gondowangi's Commitment to Natural Beauty
data.content_html:
Jakarta - PT Gondowangi believes in an inseparable bond that unites humans and nature. This belief is our main guide to continuously making natural ingredients the biggest pillar of the innovation process for body care products.


Based on the concept of “Back to Nature, Natural is Better”, we ensure that every product born from our facilities is of high quality, clinically tested, and trusted for the wider community.


More than just manufacturing goods, PT Gondowangi is committed to providing the best care experience. We combine the expertise of modern science and continuous innovation to care for and beautify every moment of our customers' lives.

We don't just create products; we also create beauty and excellence in every touch. Be part of the big family of PT Gondowangi, where every step we take is a real step towards a more natural and shining future. Discover true beauty, naturally with us!
